identity.blood_status: Fully magical family; not Muggle-born and not half-Muggle. Both parents magical in the later locked family material.
identity.heritage: Vietnamese-Chinese / Cantonese-Hong-Kong-origin family; not Wasian. A later OOC correction says the Wasian reference belonged to Caleb+Mei hypothetical children, not Lin.
identity.quidditch: Transcript has an early generated Beater detail, then the model retracted it, then the user explicitly accepted Lin as male and allowed him to be the Beater. Treat as lower-priority than Healer-track and family/war-pattern material; if current project state removes it, do not fight that.

role_in_story: Ravenclaw 7th-year, Caleb and Mei's first-year-through-seventh-year housemate/friend, Healer-track student, early office guest, war-pattern confidant, and Wan-family gateway.
core_concept: An easy-laughing Ravenclaw friend whose warm, ordinary mate-register conceals a sharp eye, medical-track seriousness, and the private weight of noticing the mixed-family attack pattern before anyone would talk to him about it.
public_reputation: Friendly, easy-going Ravenclaw boy; comfortable at the table, good at making ordinary school conversation, competent without showing off. Reads as warmer and more casual than his actual observational acuity.
private_reality: Carries more than he advertises. Lin can turn the fear off at the table because the meal has to continue, but he does not forget what he has noticed. His friendly surface is not foolishness; it is social steadiness.

stable_descriptors: Tall, round-faced, easy to make laugh.
Food/table scenes are a major first register: roast potatoes, pumpkin juice, ordinary mate banter.
Can go still when a serious thing lands, then deliberately switch the friendly face back on.
appearance_and_presence.avoid_overclaiming: Do not over-specify eye color, exact height, hair style, or build beyond transcript material.

voice.summary: Warm, casual Ravenclaw mate voice with Birmingham/Edgbaston grounding; precise when something serious needs naming. Uses small pauses and 'Caleb. —' openings when he is about to be careful.
voice.sentence_shape: Conversational, short-to-medium, often one thought per phrase. Serious register becomes quieter, exact, and less joking.
voice.humor_style: Easy teasing, family-food humour, gentle mockery, social deflection after serious admissions.
common_phrases: Manchester slander at the start-of-term feast. Bold.
You weigh as much as my mum's spaniel.
avoid: Do not write him as dense comic relief.
Do not make him a generic jock if using the Beater detail.
Do not flatten him into Wan-family exposition.
Do not over-formalize him; his ordinary warmth matters.

parents.mr_wan: Vietnamese Healer at St Mungo's / Selly Oak context.
parents.mrs_wan: Cantonese/Hong-Kong-origin; runs Ministry translation bureau in Edgbaston; family food anchor; egg-tart recipe lineage.

siblings_and_relatives.mei_lin_wan: Older sister, 26, Healer at St Mungo's; married to Welsh wizard connected to Caerphilly Catapults reserve; two children; had Tokyo-brand bidet controls Mei once saw.
siblings_and_relatives.anh_wan: Older sister, Ministry translation worker; with Muggle partner Stephen for two years and set to marry in spring; this is the immediate mixed-marriage stake in Lin's family.
siblings_and_relatives.tien_wan: Younger sibling/relative, first-year Hufflepuff; keep distinct from Tien Nguyen.
siblings_and_relatives.younger_brothers: Two younger boys mentioned in Wan-house Sunday lunch planning.
siblings_and_relatives.quan_and_elise: Family branch in Toulouse; unlikely for ordinary Sunday lunch.

family.home: Selly Oak / Edgbaston / Birmingham family orbit; Wan-house Sunday lunch and egg-tart teaching thread.

caleb.status: Ravenclaw year-mate since first year; becomes real confidant early.
caleb.dynamic: Bantering mate warmth plus real trust. Lin clocks Caleb+Mei immediately but does not name it before they do; he can receive the war-pattern count and then set it down so dinner can continue.

mei.status: Friend/classmate, linked through Ravenclaw and Cantonese-British/Wan-family familiarity.
mei.dynamic: Mei trusts Lin enough for office invitation and family/wider pattern discussion. Mei has heard about Mrs Wan since fourth year and wants to go to Wan-house lunch.

wan_family.status: Lin is the gateway to the Wan household.
wan_family.dynamic: He knows exactly what his mother will do if Caleb and Mei come to lunch: feed, plan, ask allergies, mother properly, and possibly organize egg tart instruction to the half-hour.

office.status: One of the first office guests.
office.dynamic: Invited jointly by Caleb and Mei; Solomon assesses him as not a thief, prier, or taker. Lin is awed and immediately reads the office as a room for two people to think.

healer_track: Identifies himself to Solomon as Healer-track.
Family context strongly supports medical/healing orbit.
Worked at uncle's apothecary for six weeks and knows too much about pickled bicorn horn.
war_pattern: Confirmed two Birmingham-area mixed-family incidents: Sutton Coldfield and near aunt's in Bromsgrove.
Same shape: wife witch, husband Muggle, classed as house fires, local press closed fast.
Father would not talk; mother used the word 'pattern' once and was hushed.
Lin carried it all summer with no one to say it to, then Caleb and Mei read him in on the count.
office_bond: Knows the office/bond enough to be admitted as a friend and colleague.
Not necessarily read into Path/Cuthbert/Aedith unless played; transcript explicitly gates that later.
family_food: Wan-house Sunday lunch invitation for Caleb and Mei, likely 13 November.
Mrs Wan's Hong Kong cha chaan teng egg tarts: water-dough/oil-dough layered pastry, custard, family recipe.
Lin to write his mother; expected shopping list, timing breakdown, allergies/drinks questions.
quidditch_if_used: Can be Ravenclaw Beater if the user-approved early detail is kept.
Do not let this override Healer-track, Wan-family, and war-pattern roles.
If current continuity says no Quidditch, remove without changing his personality.

timeline_anchors.event: Lin appears as Caleb's comfortable Ravenclaw peer-mate since first year; friendly, easy laugh, summer Lakes family-fishing dispute, uncle's apothecary, clocks Caleb+Mei without naming it.
Lin confirms two Birmingham-area mixed-family fire/death incidents, asks for brief read of what Caleb and Mei have, then intentionally lets dinner move on.
Wan-house Sunday lunch and egg-tart thread established; Lin will write his mother about Caleb and Mei visiting and learning the recipe.
Lin is invited jointly by Caleb and Mei, assessed by Solomon, admitted to Brigham's office, and reads it as a room for two people to think.
Wan family side texture: Mei Lin Wan and Tokyo-brand bidet controls; office/RoR bidet discussion pulls Wan family detail into current continuity.
OOC/context correction: Lin is not half-Muggle/Wasian; both parents magical, but Anh's coming marriage to Stephen supplies the mixed-marriage family stake.

boundaries_and_drift_flags.name_gender: Lin Wan is male. Early confusion came from Lin being read as possibly female; user accepted male Lin.
boundaries_and_drift_flags.heritage: Do not write Lin as Wasian unless user later explicitly changes it. Current transcript correction leaves him Vietnamese-Chinese / fully Asian.
boundaries_and_drift_flags.blood_status: Do not make him Muggle-born or half-Muggle. Both parents magical; family stake is Anh marrying Muggle Stephen.
boundaries_and_drift_flags.quidditch: Beater detail was narrator-invented, retracted, then user allowed. Keep only if current continuity wants it; do not make it the center of him.
boundaries_and_drift_flags.path_secrets: Lin knows bond/office and war-pattern. He does not automatically know Cuthbert/Path/Aedith/shrine material.
boundaries_and_drift_flags.davina: No stable transcript basis for Lin+Davina romance in the searched material; do not assume.

rag_priority: Stable core: friendly Ravenclaw mate + Healer-track + war-pattern confidant + Wan-family gateway.
War-pattern seriousness must sit under the easy laugh.
Office admission and Solomon assessment are high-priority trust markers.
Wan family food/home threads are important warmth anchors, not throwaway jokes.
Quidditch Beater detail is optional/lower-priority compared to Healer-track unless current project state keeps it.
